title: Hybrid Theory Music Discs
description: It's Hybrid Theory but as music discs
body:
**I added all 12 Hybrid Theory songs by Linkin Park to Minecraft**, _available to collect the same way as cat, mellohi, wait, blocks, ward, far or 13 as such_, including but not limited to:

- Papercut
- One Step Closer
- With You
- Points Of Authority
- Crawling
- Runaway
- In The End
- Forgotten
- Cure For The Itch
